hero.description: I build integrated digital platforms combining the power of programming with marketing intelligence to achieve your business goals.

about.title: About Me
about.description1: I'm Mostafa, a full-stack web developer and UI designer with extensive experience building medical platforms, news portals, e-commerce stores, and securing websites. I excel at merging modern development with effective digital marketing strategies.
about.description2: My passion is transforming complex ideas into simple, elegant, and scalable technical solutions. Whether you need a complex SaaS dashboard or an integrated e-commerce store built for rapid growth.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Contact Me
contact.description: Whether you have a new project or need technical consulting, I'm always available to discuss details and provide the best solutions.
